description: Accounts in Ladino. Many names are mentioned, many of which are uncommon in geniza documents: "la mujer de Nicola יצ׳׳ו Bona," "la mujer de Costa יצ׳׳ו Francoli," "la mujer de Niqola Carbona," "Marisela יצ׳׳ו Riaco(?)," "la mujer de Miḥālī יצ׳׳ו Proto," "Nicola קאביגי(?)," Geranya (גיראנייה) יצ׳׳ו Polara," "la hermanita de Ezipoli (איזיפולי)," among many others. The list uses the Hebrew honorific in between first and last names, also an uncommon feature. Requires further examination. MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בLadino. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
